test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lookup_set_fact ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, payload UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_small_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_set (id, subid) TYPE table_set ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_small_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_medium_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_set (id, subid) TYPE table_set ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_medium_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_large_indexed ( id UInt64, subid UInt64, LOOKUP INDEX idx_set (id, subid) TYPE table_set ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
CREATE TABLE lookup_set_dim_large_plain ( id UInt64, subid UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (id, subid);
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lookup_set_fact SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid, number AS payload FROM numbers(500000);
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_small_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid FROM numbers(10000);
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_small_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_set_dim_small_indexed;
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_medium_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid FROM numbers(100000);
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_medium_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_set_dim_medium_indexed;
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_large_indexed SELECT number AS id, number % 8 AS subid FROM numbers(1000000);
INSERT INTO lookup_set_dim_large_plain SELECT * FROM lookup_set_dim_large_indexed;
test.query: SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_small_indexed FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_small_plain FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_medium_indexed FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_medium_plain FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_large_indexed FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count() FROM lookup_set_fact WHERE (id, subid) IN lookup_set_dim_large_plain FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_analyzer = 1;
